Container.Name: stash-decensor
Container.Overview: On-demand video decensoring worker for Stash. Bundles DeepMosaics (mosaic removal) + Real-ESRGAN (restore/upscale) + CUDA, exposes a small HTTP API and a standalone dashboard, and pairs with the Stash UI plugin. Tuned for the NVIDIA Tesla P40 (fp32). IMPORTANT: mount your media at the SAME container paths Stash uses so stored paths resolve, and put OUTPUT_DIR inside a Stash library path.
Container.Requires: The unRAID NVIDIA Driver plugin (for the GPU) and a running Stash server.

Config.Name: Stash URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Stash server as reachable from this container.

Config.Name: Stash API Key
Config.Description: Stash > Settings > Security > API Key (required if Stash auth is on).

Config.Name: Worker Token
Config.Description: Optional shared secret; set the same value in the Stash plugin's Worker Token.

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Where cleaned files land. MUST be inside a Stash library path.

Config.Name: Real-ESRGAN FP32
Config.Description: KEEP true on Pascal cards (Tesla P40) — fp16 is ~1/64 speed.

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: Which GPUs to expose (device UUID or 'all').

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff)
Config.Description: Mount at the SAME container path Stash uses.

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff2)
Config.Description: Mount at the SAME container path Stash uses.

Config.Name: Models (persist)
Config.Description: Persists the DeepMosaics .pth weights across updates.
